tips_en: Start with Paper 3 (Self Gradient Forcing), as it isolates a fundamental training flaw—the historical context-gradient gap—that directly causes the long-horizon drift issues Paper 1 tries to combat with its LongForcing stage; understanding SGF clarifies why drift occurs and provides a generalizable solution. Then read Paper 1 for the full systems-level perspective on building a real-time interactive world model, which incorporates complementary engineering (inference co-design, data infrastructure) beyond the training method. Paper 2 (Mage-Flow) is more standalone—read it last if you want a compact, efficient image-generation reference point.
tips_zh: 建议先读第三篇（Self Gradient Forcing），因为它揭示了一个关键训练缺陷——历史上下文梯度缺失，这正是第一篇论文中 LongForcing 阶段试图缓解的长时序漂移问题的根源；理解 SGF 有助于把握漂移的本质并提供一个可推广的解法。接着读第一篇，从系统层面了解实时交互式世界模型的完整构建（数据基础设施、推理协同设计等）。第二篇（Mage-Flow）相对独立，可在最后作为高效图像生成模型的参考阅读。
